meanings.definition: the act of waiting (remaining inactive in one place while expecting something)
examples: the wait was an ordeal for him

meanings.definition: stay in one place and anticipate or expect something
examples: I had to wait on line for an hour to get the tickets
the scientists held off announcing their results until they repeated the experiment

meanings.definition: look forward to the probable occurrence of
examples: We were expecting a visit from our relatives
She is looking to a promotion
he is waiting to be drafted

meanings.definition: serve as a waiter or waitress in a restaurant
examples: I'm waiting on tables at Maxim's

meanings.definition: being and remaining ready and available for use
examples: waiting cars and limousines lined the curb
found her mother waiting for them
an impressive array of food ready and waiting for the guests
